title: Autopilot execution configuration
description: Schema for .autopilot.json. The build/test command pattern is the trusted-command policy boundary: it lives here (not in agent-editable config) so an autopilot run cannot widen its own command policy. Targets JSON Schema draft-07 to match Test-Json capabilities in PowerShell 7.

$schema.description: Optional editor association; ignored at runtime.

runtime.description: Execution mode. 'sandbox' is out of scope for this plan. The launcher -Mode parameter overrides this default.

planPath.description: Repo-relative path to the plan.md the autopilot run executes.

build.description: Build command. Must begin with a trusted launcher and contain no shell metacharacters; executed as argv with no shell.

test.description: Test command. Same trusted-launcher + no-metacharacter policy as build.

timeout.description: Per-phase timeout in minutes before force-kill.

maxIterationsPerStep.description: Fix-retry cap per step to bound in-phase churn.

credentialTarget.description: Windows Credential Manager target name holding the fine-grained PAT.
